prompts.content: Three goals: (1) Full review of all commands for consistency, logic gaps, non-happy-path issues, ambiguity reduction, and adding deterministic gates between steps. (2) Performance: package deterministic multi-step sequences into Python scripts instead of multi-turn LLM interpretation. (3) README updates: remove alpha label, add stability note, add Superpowers section, update docs to match implementation.
Switch diagrams in README to SVGs
